name: Outsmart Apps
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: User-added image]"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This add-on was built by "}, {"text": "Outsmart", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}, {"text": "
"}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://outsmart.digital", "children": [{"text": "Visit add-on website!"}]}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "For support with this add-on "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://outsmart.digital/", "children": [{"text": "contact Outsmart"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Overview"}], "data-id": "overview"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Outsmart is a suite of conversion apps, featuring One Click Upsells. One Click Upsells lets you offer relevant upsells and cross sells at the right time and place to your customers."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Outsmart uses the below data from Neto:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Products"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Categories"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Brands"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Sales order orderlines"}]}]}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Benefits & Features"}], "data-id": "benefits-features"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Integrating ease of use and seamless optimisation", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "At last, upsells and cross-sells at one with your business thanks to One Click Upsells. Increase profits the smart way."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Relevance + timing = more profit + less effort", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "Present the right offers at the right time to the right shoppers to boost your business bottom line."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Data-driven decisions deliver confidence", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "Placement of offers are determined by online shopper preferences and purchases. That’s profit growth by design."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Sales-focused because your results matter most", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "One Click Upsells focuses on delivering more profit per transaction because our success is based entirely on yours."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Unprecedented intuitive cross selling & upselling", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "The first add-on of its kind to effectively focus on increasing cart size in multiple ways during the shopper experience."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Clean, clear and concise by design", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "One Click Upsells declutters sales pages for a clearer path to upsell/cross-sell opportunities with smart layout and execution."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Install and Set up the Outsmart Apps Add-on"}], "data-id": "install-and-set-up-the-outsmart-apps-add-on"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To install and set up the Outsmart Apps add-on:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to the "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Find the "}, {"text": "Outsmart Apps", "bold": true}, {"text": " add-on and click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You’ll be redirected to the Outsmart dashboard to authenticate or create your account."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Follow the set up steps in the Outsmart "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://docs.outsmart.digital/", "children": [{"text": "help guide"}]}, {"text": "."}]}]}]}]
